title: Cobblemon Bang Experience
description: A Fabric modpack that enhances survival gameplay with Cobblemon, exploration, and quality-of-life improvements.
body:
## Cobblemon Bang Experience

Cobblemon Bang Experience is a curated Fabric modpack designed to enhance the Cobblemon gameplay experience while maintaining a balanced and smooth survival progression.

This modpack focuses on exploration, quality-of-life improvements, immersion, and performance optimizations, creating an enjoyable experience for both casual and long-term play. It combines Cobblemon with carefully selected mods that improve visuals, sound design, inventory management, world exploration, and overall game stability.

The goal of this project is to provide a well-rounded and polished modpack that feels cohesive, optimized, and comfortable to play, without drastically altering the core survival mechanics.

### Features
- Cobblemon-focused gameplay experience  
- Exploration and world-enhancing mods  
- Quality-of-life improvements  
- Performance and optimization mods  
- Fabric-based and actively maintained  

This modpack is intended for players who want an immersive and refined Cobblemon experience with a strong emphasis on stability and gameplay flow.

### Included Mods (Selection)
This modpack includes a curated selection of well-known and widely used mods, including but not limited to:

**Cobblemon & Gameplay**
- Cobblemon
- Cobblemon Additions
- Cobblemon Journey Mounts
- Simple TMs
- Mega Showdown

**Quality of Life**
- AppleSkin
- Inventory Profiles Next
- Mouse Tweaks
- Better Advancements
- Traveler’s Backpack
- Waystones

**Exploration & Immersion**
- Farmer’s Delight
- Ambient Sounds
- Presence Footsteps
- Falling Leaves
- Visuality

**Performance & Optimization**
- Sodium
- Lithium
- FerriteCore
- Entity Culling
- ImmediatelyFast

Additional utility, compatibility, and optimization mods are included to ensure stability and a smooth gameplay experience.
